title: Hgovenar
compiled_truth: Hgovenar is an external contact at [Govadv](companies/govadv). Over the corpus period (2000-02-10 to 2001-12-05), Hgovenar sent 19 and received 780 emails, totalling 799 interactions. Top correspondents: [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (13), [Sgovenar](people/sgovenar-govadv) (9), [Jdasovic](people/jdasovic) (8), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (8), [Leslie Lawner](people/leslie-lawner) (7).
